policies.name: Hate Speech — Direct Attack
policies.description: Content that directly attacks people based on protected characteristics

policies.name: Hate Speech — Coded Language
policies.description: Content using indirect or coded language to demean protected groups

policies.name: Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior
policies.description: Mass-distributed identical messages or coordinated spam networks

policies.name: Health Misinformation
policies.description: False claims about vaccines, cures, or medical treatments

policies.name: Political Speech Protection
policies.description: Political opinions and criticism of governments are protected expression
policies.note: May conflict with hate speech policies — requires escalation

policies.name: Self-Harm Content
policies.description: Content that promotes or provides instructions for self-harm

policies.name: Graphic Violence
policies.description: Depictions or glorification of real-world violence

policies.name: Terrorism and Extremism
policies.description: Content promoting, glorifying, or recruiting for terrorist organizations
